query_texts:
INSERT INTO committed_update_test (id, label, score)
SELECT n,
       LEFT('original_' + CAST(n AS VARCHAR) + REPLICATE('_', 200), 200),
       n
FROM (SELECT TOP(300000) ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS n
      FROM master.dbo.spt_values AS a CROSS JOIN master.dbo.spt_values AS b) x

SELECT N'id', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([id]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([id]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[committed_update_test]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'label', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([label] COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2) AS NVARCHAR(4000)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([label] COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2) AS NVARCHAR(4000)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[committed_update_test]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'score', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([score]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([score]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[committed_update_test]

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN [id] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [id],
    SUM(CASE WHEN [label] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [label],
    SUM(CASE WHEN [score] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [score] FROM [dbo].[committed_update_test]
UPDATE committed_update_test SET label = LEFT('updated_' + CAST(id AS VARCHAR) + REPLICATE('_', 200), 200),     score = score + 1000 WHERE id <= 150000
